# Priya Nair

Priya Nair leads Investor Relations at Initech and is driving the ESG ratings improvement engagement from the capital markets side. She owns the investor narrative around ESG progress and is the liaison to MSCI during the ratings review process. Priya is focused on ensuring the pay-equity disclosure and SBTi commitments are framed in a way that directly addresses institutional investor concerns raised in recent roadshows.
